items.title: Suggestion: add Canada-specific Hanzilla Jobs resource
items.description:
Hi! I noticed this repo is focused on 2026 entry-level software engineering roles and is primarily US-oriented.

Would you consider adding Hanzilla Jobs as a Canada-specific companion resource for students/recent grads who are using this list but also need Canadian new-grad/junior software roles?

Suggested wording if useful:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canadian software engineering new grad/junior roles](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/categories/software-engineering/) — free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad jobs board covering software engineering internships, co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles. Broader new-grad page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/
```

Why it might fit:
- Canada-specific, while this tracker is mostly US roles.
- Student/recent-grad oriented, including new-grad, junior, internship, and co-op roles.
- Broadly useful for Canadian students who still follow US-heavy SWE lists but need a local companion source.

Disclosure: I’m Hanzi, the builder of Hanzilla Jobs. Verification/about page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/ . Totally fine to close if this does not match the repo’s resource policy.

items.title: Suggestion: add Canada-specific data/ML new-grad jobs resource
items.description:
Hi Zapply maintainers — thanks for maintaining this data science / analytics / ML new-grad list for students.

I noticed the README is focused on real-time 2026 data science, analytics, and ML roles, mostly US listings. Would you be open to adding a Canada-specific companion resource for students/recent grads who are looking for Canadian data/analytics/AI/ML roles?

Suggested resource:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canada data, analytics & AI/ML student jobs](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/categories/data-ml/) — free daily-updated Canadian university student/recent-grad job board covering data, analytics, AI/ML, software, finance, engineering, business, sciences, internships/co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles. Also has a [new-grad landing page](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/) and [about/verification page](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/).
```

Why I think it fits this repo:
- Your list is useful for students/new grads looking at data science / analytics / ML roles.
- Hanzilla is Canada-specific, so it can complement the mostly US-facing listings without competing with the repo's core table.
- The linked data/ML page is live, indexable, and updated from company career pages; the about page explains the project/contact details.

Disclosure: I’m Hanzi, the builder of Hanzilla Jobs. Totally fine if this does not fit your resource policy — wanted to suggest it transparently rather than open a drive-by duplicate PR.

items.title: Add Canada data/new-grad jobs companion resource?
items.description:
Hi! I noticed this generated data-analysis new-grad tracker already includes quite a few Canada-relevant roles (for example Markham/Ontario, Toronto, Vancouver, and other Canada rows).

Would you consider adding Hanzilla Jobs as a Canada-specific companion resource for students/recent grads using this list?

Suggested wording:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canada data/AI/analytics new-grad and junior roles](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/categories/data-ml/) — free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad job board with data, analytics, AI/ML, software, finance, engineering, business, sciences, internship/co-op, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles. Related: [new-grad guide](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/) and [verification/about](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/).
```

Small disclosure: I’m helping maintain Hanzilla Jobs. The reason I’m suggesting it here is that your tracker is broad and useful, but students in Canada often need a Canada-specific deep link alongside global/generated lists.

items.title: Suggestion: add Canada-specific Hanzilla Jobs internship resource
items.description:
Hi Zapply team — thanks for maintaining this broad internships tracker.

I noticed the list is primarily U.S.-focused, but it does surface some Canada-relevant internship/co-op roles too (for example Magna roles in Ontario). Would you be open to adding a small Canada-specific companion resource for students who land here while searching from Canadian universities?

Suggested Markdown:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canadian student internships/co-ops](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/) — free daily-updated board for Canadian university students and recent grads, covering internships, co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles across tech, data/AI, finance, engineering, business, sciences, and more. See also the [about/verification page](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/).
```

Why it might fit:
- Canada-specific coverage for students who need Canadian locations / remote-Canada roles, not only U.S. listings.
- Direct links go to company career pages; no paywall.
- It is broader than SWE only, so it can complement your tech/software internship list without trying to replace it.

Disclosure: I’m building Hanzilla Jobs. Totally okay if this is not the right fit for this repo — sharing because it may help Canadian students using the tracker.

items.title: Consider including a link to the company website in addition to their jobs page
items.description: Frequently, companies link directly to their HR product (e.g. Greenhouse), but later they switch, the link is broken and... in companies with generic names, it becomes impossible to track them down again.

items.title: Canada-specific engineering internship companion resource
items.description:
Hi Jobright team — I’m Hanzi, a recent McGill grad building Hanzilla Jobs.

I noticed this tracker covers a broad set of engineering/development internships and includes some Canada-relevant roles. Would you be open to adding a small Canada-specific companion resource for students who want a daily-updated Canadian view?

Suggested line:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Engineering internships and early-career roles in Canada](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/engineering/) — free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad job board covering engineering, software, data, environmental/energy, business-adjacent technical roles, internships/co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level positions. Related: [internships/co-ops](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/).
```

Verification/about page for link safety: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

No pressure if external companion links are out of scope — I figured it may be useful for Canadian students using this repo alongside US-heavy internship lists.

items.title: Cartrack VN - Senior AI Engineer (Computer Vision) - HCM - FT
items.description:
## Location 

* 408 Dien Bien Phu, Vuon Lai Ward, HCM

## Salary Range 

* Open Salary

## Requirements 

* Minimum 6+ years of relevant experience in video/image detection, prediction, classification, or signal processing.
* Proficient with Python, PyTorch, and a strong academic background in CS, Engineering, Mathematics, or Statistics.
* A self-motivated engineer who prefers deep technical optimization over AI hype and enjoys collaborating in a fast-paced R&D hub.

## Responsibilities 

* Conceptualize and develop computer vision models to model driver behavior, road detection, signal detection, in cabin characteristics, etc.
* Provide signals based on video/image detection algorithms for other machine learning algorithms, such as road flow or traffic densities.
* Develop signal processing models as to characterize the attributes to a time series matrix.
* Test and put algorithms into a production ready state.
* Constructing solution concepts from insights using familiar or unfamiliar data sources or complete or partial data.
* Imputing the dependency between sensors and time series data.
* Design and build machine/deep learning and optimization algorithms efficiently
* Integrate, simulate, and test the impact of algorithms and features on the overall system
* Develop and execute necessary analyses, simulations, etc. to validate models and identify improvement opportunities
* Store, retrieve and visualize results in a manner that facilitates required analyses
* Effectively conceptualize analyses to business/product stakeholders

## Why it would be awesome to work with us

* Attractive salary
* Flat organization structure
* Lean & Agile: No unnecessary red tape.
* Quality First: We care about clean, scalable code.
* Execution Mindset: We focus on getting the job done.
    
## Interesting Engineering Projects 

* We have worked on camera/ sensor related projects, but our Head has more interesting plans, I would prefer him to discuss further with you :P 
* Choose Cartrack VN if you prefer a fast-paced environment, love building robust, production-grade systems that handle massive real-world scale, and want to see your AI models directly impact global fleet safety and logistics efficiency.

## Contact 
* if you are interested please feel free to reach out to Giang - Senior Recruiter at giang.vu@cartrack.com. Many thanks!

Would you consider adding a small Canada-specific companion resource link for students who use this repo but want more Canadian student/new-grad coverage?

For trust/context, the project about/verification page is here: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

items.title: New Feature Request: Adding an Event Page
items.description:
### Improvement

Adding a dedicated "Tech Events & Discovery Programs" page to the SimplifyJobs Summer2026-Internships repo is the ultimate way to capture the hidden recruiting pipeline.

For top-tier firms—especially in quantitative finance and big tech—programs like Explore HRT or Citadel Discover aren't just networking; they are fast-tracks straight to internship offers. However, these events are notoriously hard to track, dropping without warning and closing within days.

Centralizing them into a single, scannable list solves this visibility problem. It prevents students from missing critical early-career opportunities, levels the playing field for underrepresented applicants, and transforms the repository from a seasonal job tracker into a year-round career dashboard. It perfectly matches Simplify’s mission to make tech recruiting completely transparent.

items.title: [Remoto] Full Cycle Developer (Júnior) na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: 
Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios.


Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/full-cycle-developer-junior-175603413?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋
Estamos contratando: **Pessoa Desenvolvedora Full Cycle**

Quer fazer parte de um time que está transformando a logística por meio da tecnologia? Se você é apaixonado(a) por desenvolvimento, gosta de desafios e quer participar da construção de soluções que geram impacto real no negócio, essa oportunidade pode ser para você!

**O que você vai fazer no dia a dia:**

Atuar em todas as etapas do ciclo de desenvolvimento, desde a modelagem da solução até o acompanhamento em produção; Desenvolver soluções de ponta a ponta, colaborando com equipes multidisciplinares; Contribuir ativamente para a transformação digital da logística, elevando o nível de qualidade e eficiência dos nossos processos; Participar da construção de produtos e soluções inovadoras com impacto direto na operação.

**O que oferecemos:**

*   Ambiente promissor para crescimento pessoal e profissional;
    
*   Contato direto com um time de tecnologia altamente qualificado;
    
*   Espaço para inovação, aprendizado contínuo e desenvolvimento de carreira.
    

Se você gosta de desafios, inovação e quer crescer junto com um time que está construindo o futuro da logística, queremos conhecer você!
## BeTruck: 
 • Colaboramos muito, uns com os outros. Troca de conhecimento é o nosso lema, e geramos crescimento e inovação;• Nosso time é dinâmico e ágil;• Temos autonomia e liberdade para propor soluções e exercer nossa criatividade;• Idéias? Claro! São muito bem-vindas;• O bom humor e a leveza estão sempre presentes por aqui, acredite;• Respeitamos os prazos e a qualidade das entregas! PROCURAMOS ALGUÉM QUE:• Queira aprender coisas novas e seja apaixonado por desafios;• Seja focado e proativo;• Possuir pensamento lógico;• Trabalhe com dinamismo e agilidade e goste de entregar resultados; Aqui na BeTruck, você conhece e participa de todo o projeto, não apenas de uma fatia. Cresce e aprende muito!! 

undefined 



 ## Habilidades: 
 - Nest.JS 
- React.js 
- AWS 
- SQL
## Local: 
 Remota
## Requisitos: 
 - Experiência em desenvolvimento full cycle utilizando tecnologias javascript (nest.js / React.js) 
- Conhecimento e experiência AWS 
- SQL

## Benefícios: 
 - É disponibilizado o Onhappy
## Como se candidatar:
Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Full Cycle Developer (Júnior) na BeTruck](https://coodesh.com/jobs/full-cycle-developer-junior-175603413?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open)


Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação.
## Labels
#### Alocação
Remoto
#### Regime
CLT
#### Categoria
Full-Stack

items.title: WAOHire - Senior Fullstack Developer (Golang) - Hybrid HCMC - FT
items.description:
**Responsibilities:**
- Build and scale product experiences across backend and frontend systems.
- Develop high-performance services using Go while collaborating across Java-based environments.
- Deliver responsive and scalable user experiences using Angular and/or ReactJS.
- Design and operate cloud-native infrastructure on AWS.
- Collaborate closely with Product, Design, and Engineering teams globally.
- Contribute to architecture decisions and improve engineering standards.
- Work in a fast experimentation environment driven by customer and business feedback.
- Use AI-enhanced engineering workflows to improve delivery velocity and quality.
- Participate in improving reliability, observability, and operational excellence.

**Requirements:**
- 5+ years of software engineering experience in product environments.
- Strong backend development experience with Go (preferred) and exposure to Java (nice-to-have).
- Strong frontend experience with Angular and/or ReactJS.
- Hands-on experience building and operating workloads on AWS.
- Experience delivering end-to-end applications across backend and frontend layers.
- Experience working with APIs, distributed systems, and modern engineering practices.
- Exposure to Web3 ecosystems, blockchain products, or digital ownership platforms.
- AI-first mentality and comfort using AI tools to improve productivity.
- Be extremely active experimenting with AI-driven art pipelines. Heavily integrating AI into your work.
- Strong communication skills in English, both written and verbal.

**Benefits:**
- Competitive salary upto $2500 (100% paid during probation).
- Work on products used globally with talented international team.
- 13th-month salary, annual performance review.
- Annual health check-ups.
- Full insurance (Social, Health, and Unemployment Insurance) in compliance with Vietnam Labor Law.
- Location: District 1, HCMC

Please contact **+84 834033300 (Zalo/Whatsapp)** for more details

items.title: Frontend developer/ Senior - Salary: $3000 - $4500
items.description:
📍 Location: Remote

🚀 Frontend Developer Needed (3+ Years Experience)

We're looking for a Frontend Developer with at least 3 years of experience to update and enhance an existing project:

https://bitbucket.org/mari-chain/lmng-2026/src/master/

Requirements:
✅ 3+ years of frontend development experience
✅ React.js / TypeScript
✅ Modern JavaScript, HTML, CSS
✅ Experience maintaining and improving existing applications

As part of the application process, please review the project repository, set it up locally, and share your thoughts on the current implementation. Specifically, we'd like to hear:
• Whether you can successfully run the project
• Any issues or improvements you identify
• What changes or enhancements you would make to the first landing page
• Your proposed approach for improving UI/UX, performance, and user engagement

Compensation:
💰 Hourly rate: $50–$80 USD (depending on experience and expertise)

Please send:
• Your CV 
• Availability
• Expected hourly rate
• Your feedback after reviewing the project

📩 Interested?
Contact me via Telegram(@chain_empires)

items.title: [Remote] Web3 Security Lead / Senior - Salary: $2500 - $3000
items.description:
💰 Salary: $2500 - $3000 
📍 Location: **Remote & Hybrid work model with an office based in Ho Chi Minh City**

🛠 Key Responsibilities:
- Coordinate smart contract audits, remediation, and Web3 regulatory readiness.
- Perform security reviews for vendors, custodians, exchanges, and protocols.
Support cloud infrastructure, applications, IAM, and internal systems security.

🎯 What We Are Looking For:
- Experience: 5+ years in cybersecurity, with 2+ years specifically in blockchain, smart contracts, or Web3 infrastructure.
- Core Tech: Strong understanding of Ethereum/EVM ecosystems, wallets, multisigs, and common Web3 attack vectors.
- Tools & Cloud: Familiarity with Web3 monitoring tools (e.g., Hypernative, Blockaid, Fireblocks, SAFE) and AWS/SaaS environments.
- Skills: Strong communication, stakeholder management, and ability to thrive in a fast-moving environment.

Contact me via Zalo 0834424446 - Lâm

items.title: [Remoto/Híbrido São Paulo, Rio de Janeiro e Curitiba] Back-end  Engineer Python - Jcal Consultoria
items.description:
🚀 OPORTUNIDADE INTERNACIONAL | BACK-END ENGINEER (PYTHON) | HEALTHCARE | 🌎💻(Mínimo 8 anos de experiências, Inglês avançado) 

🔗 Conecte-se comigo no LinkedIn:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/thisclaudia


Se você é Engenheiro de Software Sênior e busca atuar em um ambiente global, com autonomia real e impacto direto no produto, essa oportunidade pode ser para você.
Estamos em busca de talentos para integrar uma empresa internacional do setor de Healthcare, trabalhando em projetos relevantes e com forte foco em qualidade, escalabilidade e inovação.
💡 Experiência com regulamentações como HIPAA/PHI é um diferencial, mas não obrigatória.
📍 Localização
Profissionais localizados em São Paulo ou Rio de Janeiro são bem-vindos a se candidatar.
🏡 A posição inicia 100% remota para profissionais residentes nestas localidades e posteriormente terá modelo híbrido em Curitiba (PR).

💰 Remuneração: USD $3.000k – $4.750k / mês

🔎 Requisitos Gerais
✔ Inglês avançado (colaboração com times dos Estados Unidos)
✔ +8 anos de experiência em desenvolvimento de software
✔ Ensino Superior Completo em Ciência da Computação, Engenharia de Software ou áreas correlatas
✔ Forte senso de ownership — da ideia à produção
✔ Perfil proativo, independente e orientado a resultados


💻 SENIOR BACK-END ENGINEER (PYTHON)

🎯 Missão da posição:
Construir serviços escaláveis, seguros e confiáveis, contribuindo diretamente para a evolução da plataforma.
Responsabilidades:
• Desenvolver APIs e serviços backend escaláveis
• Trabalhar com bancos de dados SQL e NoSQL
• Implementar testes automatizados (unitários, integração e e2e)
• Desenvolver e manter pipelines de CI/CD
• Atuar com monitoramento, métricas, logs e suporte em produção
• Contribuir com decisões técnicas e arquiteturais

⭐ Diferenciais
✔ Experiência com decisões arquiteturais pragmáticas
✔ Automação de processos e melhoria contínua
✔ Capacidade de identificar gargalos e propor soluções escaláveis
✔ Mentalidade forte de qualidade (sem time separado de QA)

💡 O mais importante: buscamos profissionais com autonomia, responsabilidade e mentalidade de produto.

Se essa oportunidade faz sentido para você ou para alguém da sua rede, compartilhe ou entre em contato neste link abaixo 👇🏻 
https://wa.me/5519978164262?text=Ol%C3%A1%0ASeja%20muito%20bem%20vindo(a)%0AVoc%C3%AA%20entrou%20em%20contato%20para%20conversarmos%20sobre%20oportunidades,%20logo%20mais%20irei%20te%20atender

items.title: Add Canada-specific student/new-grad companion resource?
items.description:
Hi! I’m Hanzi, a recent Canadian grad building Hanzilla Jobs.

I noticed this repo is a fast-updating new-grad tracker across tech, finance, healthcare, and more. For Canadian students/recent grads who land here but want Canada-specific early-career roles, would you consider adding a small companion resource link?

Suggested line:

```md
- [Hanzilla Jobs — Canada student/recent-grad jobs](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/) — free daily-updated Canadian internships, co-ops, new-grad, junior, and entry-level roles across tech, finance, engineering, business, sciences, and more. Also has an [internships/co-ops page](https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/).
```

Why it might fit:
- Canada-specific roles and city pages, so it complements this repo instead of replacing it.
- Covers broad early-career fields, not only software.
- Public about/verification page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

Happy to open a PR if you prefer an exact README location/format. Thanks for maintaining this resource.

items.title: [Remoto] Gerente de Serviços na Coodesh
items.description:
## Descrição da vaga: 
Esta é uma vaga de um parceiro da plataforma Coodesh, ao candidatar-se você terá acesso as informações completas sobre a empresa e benefícios.


Fique atento ao redirecionamento que vai te levar para uma url [https://coodesh.com](https://coodesh.com/jobs/gerente-de-servicos-211956196?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open) para realizar a candidatura. 👋
**Seu papel nessa jornada:**

*   Experiência em gestão de serviços e relacionamento com clientes corporativos
    
*   Conhecimentos e experiências em
    
*   Processos de ITIL, e frameworks COBIT
    
*   Cibersegurança (NIST, ISF e equivalentes) e LGPD
    
*   Ferramentas de cibersegurança como (SIEM, XDR, DLP, Cloud Security).
    

 

**Se você possui os requisitos abaixo, essa oportunidade pode ser sua:**

*   Pelo menos 4 a 6 anos de experiência atuando como Gerente de serviço (TI)
    
*   Capacidade de atuar em ambiente matricial, com forte habilidade de comunicação e negociação
    
*   Organização e visão analítica para acompanhamento de métricas e indicadores.
    
*   Capacidade de avaliação de riscos e impactos.
    
*   Inglês avançado.
    

 

**Formação:**

 

• Superior completo em Ciências da Computação, Engenharias, Segurança da Informação ou áreas relacionadas

 

**Pode ser um diferencial, se você tiver:**

*   Ter experiência em cibersegurança comprovada
    

 

**São nossos valores:**

Agimos com integridade

Fazemos a diferença

Cuidamos das pessoas

Trabalhamos juntos

Desafiamos o limite do possível

 

**Você está pronto(a) para fazer a diferença? Aqui, você pode crescer de forma real.**

 

**Nós somos a PwC.** Somos visionários. Trabalhamos com tecnologias de ponta, impulsionados pelas nossas pessoas, para entregar valor, gerar impacto e levar nossos clientes à vanguarda.

 

Em tempos de transformação acelerada, utilizamos nossa expertise em indústrias, nossa experiência, competências e serviços integrados para construir confiança e resolver problemas importantes.

 

Somos guiados pelos nossos valores, consistentes em nossa qualidade e dedicados a fazer a diferença. Aqui, seu desenvolvimento e crescimento se tornam uma vantagem para nossos clientes e influenciam o futuro do mundo.

 

**Grow here. Go further.**
## PWC BR: 
 Na PwC, o nosso propósito é construir confiança na sociedade e resolver problemas importantes. Somos um Network de firmas presente em 155 países e formado por mais de 284 mil profissionais, ajudamos organizações e indivíduos oferecendo qualidade na prestação de serviços integrados nas áreas de auditoria e asseguração, consultoria tributária, consultoria estratégica e assessoria em transações. Estamos no Brasil há mais de 100 anos, contamos com cerca de 4 mil profissionais, distribuídos em 15 escritórios em todas as regiões brasileiras. Nossa comunidade de solvers está pronta para solucionar qualquer desafio, independentemente do tamanho ou do segmento de atuação da sua empresa. Não importa se o cliente é uma startup, empresa familiar ou companhia de capital aberto. Reunimos os melhores talentos nas mais diferentes especialidades e combinamos as tecnologias mais inovadoras para propor ideias ousadas, capazes de criar valor, hoje e amanhã, para as empresas, seus stakeholders, clientes e a sociedade em geral. Saiba mais sobre a PwC Brasil e nos diga o que é importante para sua empresa ou carreira, visitando nosso site: www.pwc.com.br 

undefined 



 ## Habilidades: 
 - COBIT 
- ITIL 
- SIEM 
- Cloud Security
## Local: 
 Remota



## Como se candidatar:
Candidatar-se exclusivamente através da plataforma Coodesh no link a seguir: [Gerente de Serviços na PWC BR](https://coodesh.com/jobs/gerente-de-servicos-211956196?utm_source=github&utm_medium=programadores-br-geral&modal=open)


Após candidatar-se via plataforma Coodesh e validar o seu login, você poderá acompanhar e receber todas as interações do processo por lá. Utilize a opção **Pedir Feedback** entre uma etapa e outra na vaga que se candidatou. Isso fará com que a pessoa **Recruiter** responsável pelo processo na empresa receba a notificação.
## Labels
#### Alocação
Remoto
#### Regime
CLT
#### Categoria
Cyber Segurança

items.title: Consider Hanzilla Jobs as a Canada-specific new-grad companion resource
items.description:
Hi — thanks for maintaining this automated new-grad list.

I’m building Hanzilla Jobs, a free daily-updated Canadian student/recent-grad jobs board: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/

It is not meant to replace this repo, but it may be a useful Canada-specific companion resource for students who land here while looking for early-career roles. Hanzilla focuses on Canadian internships, co-ops, new grad, junior, and entry-level roles across software, data/ML, engineering, business, finance, sciences, and other student-relevant fields.

A couple relevant deep links:

- New grad / junior roles: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/new-grad/
- Canada internships / co-ops: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/internships/
- About / verification page: https://jobs.hanzilla.co/about/

If you think it fits, would you consider adding a small “Canada-specific companion resources” or “Related resources” note somewhere in the README/docs? No worries if that is outside the scope of this repo.

Disclosure: I’m the builder of Hanzilla Jobs.
